When to use:

Configure and fix Angular CI quality gates. Use when setting up or repairing ng build, ng test, ESLint with angular-eslint, Prettier, strict template type checking, Karma or Jest CI runs, coverage thresholds, or pipeline failures on lint, typecheck, or unit tests.
